name: YouTube Chat
description: YouTube Live chat reader/writer using central godisalotachat YouTube OAuth data. Keeps API liveChatId for sending while reading can use web fallback; logs exact Google send errors.
description_de: Liest und schreibt den YouTube-Livechat über die zentrale YouTube-Anmeldung und protokolliert genaue Sendefehler.
description_en: Reads and writes YouTube live chat using central YouTube authentication and logs exact sending errors.
